title: The new monday academy is here!

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re thrilled to unveil the NEW and FRESH version of monday academy!
a dynamic learning hub to master monday.com, boost professional skills, and advance careers. What’s included:
Quick, actionable lessons for rapid growth
Role-specific guided learning paths
Industry-recognized certifications
Live webinars with monday experts

Your skills. Your career. Powered by monday.com
CLICK HERE TO START YOUR JOURNY
